headline: The Boeing Company (BA) is Awarded a $166.84M Navy Contract for P-8A Systems Engineering and Modernization Work
summary: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is among the 15 Best Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 10 Years. On February 27, 2026, The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) was awarded a $166.84M cost-plus-fixed-fee, indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity contract to provide engineering analysis, software maintenance, support services, and modernization work for P-8A systems supporting Navy sustainment tasks tied to obsolescence […]
